news.headline: Trump: I still have a good relationship with the North Korean leader.

BTC dominance at 4-year high. ETH/BTC at 5-year low. Stablecoins surpass ETH mkt cap. UAE fund invests $2bn in Binance. Ripple gets Dubai license. Russia opens crypto trading. Rumble buys $17m BTC. Franklin files SOL ETF. Cantor Fitzgerald launches BTC lending. MEXC acquires $16m ENA, $20m USDe. India arrests Garantex co-founder.
news.summary: After the Consumer Price Index (CPI) report, the crypto rally took a hit. Bitcoin (BTC) dominance reached a four-year high while the Ethereum (ETH) to BTC ratio hit a five-year low. ETH slid out of the top 20 revenue-generating protocols. The market cap of stablecoins has exceeded that of ETH. The Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) postponed options for the Fidelity ETH exchange-traded fund (ETF). The Federal Reserve designated BTC as a 'hard reserve asset'. The United Arab Emirates’ sovereign fund made a $2 billion investment in Binance. Ripple secured its first payments license in Dubai, but its settlement with the SEC might involve a sales ban. Russia is preparing to allow local residents to engage in crypto trading. Rumble purchased $17 million worth of BTC. Franklin submitted paperwork for a Solana (SOL) ETF in collaboration with the Chicago Board Options Exchange (CBOE). Cantor Fitzgerald launched a BTC-backed lending service. Lazarusa moved 400 ETH to Tornado Cash for privacy. MEXC acquired $16 million worth of ENA and $20 million of USDe. In India, a co-founder of Garantex was arrested.

news.headline: UAE official to press the US on ability to buy more Nvidia AI chips. $NVDA
Apploi partners with CentralReach, leading Autism and IDD Care software provider, enhancing workforce platform.
news.summary: On March 13, 2025, in New York, Apploi, a prominent workforce platform for healthcare employers, revealed a recent collaboration with CentralReach, the top provider of Autism and IDD Care software for ABA, multidisciplinary, and special education services. This partnership aims to enhance employment opportunities and services within the healthcare industry, particularly for individuals with Autism and Intellectual/Developmental Disabilities (IDD). This move is set to impact a wide demographic, reflecting the companies' commitment to improving access to employment for individuals with diverse needs. The union of these two leading entities signifies the joining of forces to address gaps in employment resources and opportunities, ultimately benefiting both employers and job seekers alike. This strategic partnership is expected to catalyze positive changes in the healthcare employment landscape, ultimately fostering more inclusive and supportive work environments for all individuals involved.

news.headline: Photo Managers, Picturli, and Epson join forces in LA to support families affected by wildfires with photo digitizing; event on March 13, 2025.
news.summary: A recent local event in Los Alamitos, California held on March 13, 2025, along with an online series, is providing assistance to help families digitize their photos. This initiative aims to help families preserve their priceless memories while also supporting wildfire relief efforts following the Los Angeles fires. The event and online series offer digitizing services to convert physical photos into digital formats. This effort not only helps families safeguard their memories but also contributes to fundraising for wildfire relief. The community has come together to emphasize the significance of preserving memories and supporting those affected by the recent wildfires.

news.headline: Vantiva's 2024 results show positive FCF, adjusted EBITDA at 104M euros, sales up 19.3% to 1,865M euros, and SCS divestiture at 100M euros loss. CEO optimistic about connectivity business and cost synergies in 2025.
news.summary: Vantiva's 2024 financial results show sales increased by 19.3% to 1,865 million euros, with an Adjusted EBITDA of 104 million euros and Adjusted EBITA of 41 million euros. Net income from continuing operations was a loss of 161 million euros. The company had a positive Free Cash Flow of 33 million euros. Vantiva also held cash and cash equivalents of 30 million euros and a net nominal debt of 478 million euros. The SCS business unit divestiture is expected to incur an impairment of about 100 million euros. CEO Tim O'Loughlin stated that despite challenges, Vantiva met its 2024 guidance and is now focusing on connectivity businesses. For 2025, Vantiva expects sales to remain in line with 2024 levels, with adjusted EBITDA expected to exceed 150 million euros and positive Free Cash Flow.

news.headline: Daxa recognized in 2025 Gartner Market Guide for AI TRiSM for AI Governance and Runtime Inspection&Enforcement. AI security a pressing challenge as enterprises adopt AI rapidly.
news.summary: A renowned AI data security and governance company called Daxa has recently made it into the 2025 Gartner Market Guide for AI Trust, Risk & Security Management (AI TRiSM) for the AI Governance and Runtime Inspection and Enforcement category. This recognition comes as more companies are incorporating AI technologies into their operations. The need to safeguard AI applications against issues like data exposure, compliance breaches, and internal risks has become a critical concern. Many traditional security approaches and add-on AI defenses have proven insufficient in protecting AI during its operational phase.

news.headline: 29 counterparties take $113.435 bln at Fed Reverse Repo Operation.
Blanket partners with SPM to enhance operations & client experience with advanced technology, aiding SPM's growth.
news.summary: In Miami on March 13, 2025, Blanket, a prominent player in property management technology, revealed a strategic alliance with Specialized Property Management (SPM) aimed at leveraging cutting-edge tools to improve operations and customer satisfaction. The partnership aims to fuel SPM’s expansion efforts by offering advanced technological solutions.

news.headline: InventHelp inventor from El Paso, Texas creates CTK-1486 soundproof dog kennel to reduce anxiety in dogs during loud events.
news.summary: In Pittsburgh on March 13, 2025, an inventor from El Paso, Texas shared their inspiration for creating a sound-proof product for dogs. The innovation aimed to alleviate anxiety during loud events like fireworks, storms, and air transportation. The inventor introduced the SOUNDPROOF DOG KENNEL to address these concerns.

news.headline: Trump on shutdown negotiations: If they need me, I'm available.
Wolters Kluwer priced 7-year Eurobond at €500 million with success.
Vantron launches VT-USB-AH-8108 Wi-Fi HaLow Dongle powered by Morse Micro's MM8108 chipset at Embedded World.
news.summary: On March 13, 2025, in Nuremberg, Germany, Vantron, a top provider of embedded IoT solutions, unveiled the VT-USB-AH-8108 Wi-Fi HaLow Dongle at Embedded World. This innovative product is powered by Morse Micro's cutting-edge MM8108 chipset. The compact VT-USB-AH-8108 offers powerful Wi-Fi connectivity, catering to the growing demand for efficient IoT solutions.

news.headline: EssilorLuxottica: Share capital and voting rights as of March 12, 2025 disclosed.
Solvay buys back shares in recent acquisition.
L.B. Foster Company to present at Sidoti Small Cap Virtual Conference on March 20, 2025 at 2:30 PM EST. CEO and CFO to speak. Materials to be posted morning of conference.
news.summary: In Pittsburgh on March 13, 2025, L.B. Foster Company (Nasdaq: FSTR) shared news that its President and CEO, John Kasel, and EVP and CFO, Bill Thalman, will attend the Sidoti Small Cap Virtual Conference on March 20, 2025, at 2:30 PM EST. Presentation materials will be available on the Company’s Investor Relations website under “Presentations” on the day of the event.

news.headline: Kering announces Demna as Artistic Director of Gucci, a major move in fashion industry.
Non-lethal weapons market to reach US$18.28 billion by 2033 from US$12.34 billion in 2024 with a 4.46% CAGR.
news.summary: A report on the Non-Lethal Weapons Market projects significant growth, with an expected increase from US$12.34 billion in 2024 to US$18.28 billion by 2033. The compound annual growth rate (CAGR) from 2025 to 2033 is anticipated to be 4.46%. Factors driving this growth include heightened security concerns, demands for crowd control, law enforcement needs, human rights considerations, advancements in technology, and a shift towards less lethal military solutions. The report has been included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings.

news.headline: Managerial agreement signed on 7th March 2025 at AB Novaturas; Ugnius Radvila to sell 740,702 shares to Neset Kockar. Value undisclosed.
news.summary: AB Novaturas recently disclosed that a binding agreement was signed on March 7, 2025, by Ugnius Radvila, a member of the Company's Management Board. The agreement pertains to the sale of 740,702 shares in the company by Mr. Radvila to Neset Kockar, a prominent figure in the Turkish tourism industry. The exact value of the transaction has not been revealed as the main contract is still pending finalization.

news.headline: Small caps signal recession alarm, but credit markets unfazed. Russell 2000 down 17%, implying 52% recession chance. S&P 500 drops 8.7%.
news.summary: Wall Street is once again bracing for a possible recession, but opinions remain divided. JPMorgan's Nikolaos Panigirtzoglou notes that U.S. markets are conveying conflicting messages about the economy's future. Small-cap stocks, bond yields, and base metals are showing concerning signs, while credit markets appear unfazed, mirroring previous false alarms.The Russell 2000 small-cap index has plummeted 17% from its peak, suggesting a 52% chance of a U.S. recession based on past downturns. The iShares Russell 2000 ETF (NYSE:IWM), which tracks this index, has dipped 9.46% year-to-date and 11.47% in the last month. The S&P 500 ETF (ARCA: ) has also dropped by 8.7%. More insights available on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Ellavoz Impact Capital finishes site improvements at Cedar Creek Estates in Jacksonville, Florida; to start vertical construction in April.
news.summary: Ellavoz Impact Capital (EIC), a prominent real estate impact investment and management firm based in Jacksonville, Florida, has successfully finished the site work for its latest project, Cedar Creek Estates. Situated within an Opportunity Zone in Jacksonville, the new project aims to address the increasing need for affordable, high-quality housing in the area. The company is set to commence vertical construction in April, marking a significant milestone in its innovative build-to-rent single-family residential community. This development comes at a crucial time as the demand for such housing solutions continues to rise in Jacksonville.

news.headline: Trump: I don't think Russia will attack other allies. We'll make sure it doesn't happen.
Tomer Gabay appointed as Spectrum Dynamics Medical's new CEO, effective March 10, 2025, replacing Gilad Yoeli.
news.summary: A company based in Sarasota, Florida, Spectrum Dynamic Medical, known for its advancements in diagnostic imaging solutions, has recently appointed Tomer Gabay as its new Chief Executive Officer starting March 10, 2025. This change in leadership comes as Gilad Yoeli steps down from the position.

news.headline: Panama approves First Quantum to export stockpiled copper from mine.
UQD Coupling for Liquid Cooling Market to reach $1931 million by 2030 with 27.1% CAGR growth - Valuates Reports.
news.summary: In Bangalore, India on March 13, 2025, a new Universal Quick Disconnect (UQD) Coupling for the Liquid Cooling Market has been introduced. This innovation is segmented by type including Nickel Plated Brass Material, Aluminum Alloy, and Stainless Steel Material. Its application areas include Data Center Liquid Cooling and Supercomputer Liquid Cooling. The introduction of this UQD Coupling signifies a significant advancement in the liquid cooling sector.

news.headline: CEO Jörg Brinkmann of H+H International A/S purchased shares, following EU Regulation 596/2014 disclosure.
news.summary: In the latest company announcement, CEO Jörg Brinkmann acquired shares in H+H International A/S based in COPENHAGEN, Denmark. This notification, under article 19 of EU Regulation no. 596/2014, discloses the purchase made by the CEO. The details of the transaction are outlined in company announcement No. 578 of March 13, 2025.

news.headline: Global multi-use bioreactor market in pharmaceuticals and research institutions will reach $12.26 billion by 2029, growing 9.7% annually.
news.summary: In Bangalore, India, on March 13, 2025, a recent report indicates that the Multi Use Bioreactor Market has been divided into types including Manual, Automatic, and Semi-Automatic, with applications in Pharmaceuticals and Scientific Research Institutions. The survey shows that the Global Multi Use Bioreactor Market is estimated to achieve a value of USD [specific amount not provided] in the near future.

UKG again named HCM leader for 14th year, highlighting AI-powered UKG Pro® suite, with UKG BryteTM AI Agents.
news.summary: In Lowell, Massachusetts, and Weston, Florida, UKG, a prominent provider of HR, payroll, and workforce management solutions, revealed that they have been recognized as a Leader in the Nucleus Research HCM Technology Value Matrix report for the 14th year in a row. The latest report for 2025 emphasized UKG Pro®, powered by AI, applauding ongoing advancements and new features like the introduction of UKG BryteTM AI Agents as factors propelling UKG's consistent leadership in the industry.

news.headline: Jeeva.ai introduces groundbreaking feature Signals for sales automation, promising dynamic prospecting with Agentic AI.
news.summary: A company based in Santa Monica, California, Jeeva.ai, known for its innovative sales automation solutions, is set to introduce a new feature called Signals. This groundbreaking feature will provide AI agents equipped with Agentic AI direct access to Signals, allowing them to easily search, analyze, and implement outreach strategies with exceptional precision. This development aims at revolutionizing sales outreach by incorporating dynamic innovation through features like Dynamic Prospecting, which automatically updates prospect lists to reflect current market trends.

news.headline: US 30-Year Bond High Yield Actual 4.623% (Forecast -, Previous 4.748%)
Verdek is revolutionizing border security in Virginia with fully charged patrol vehicles. #greenenergy #innovation
news.summary: In Monroe, Connecticut, on March 13, 2025, as the scorching summer sun emerges over the Virginia outposts of the U.S. Customs and Border Protection (CBP), a patrol vehicle is seen in action. This vehicle, previously dependent on traditional fuel methods emitting harmful fumes, now smoothly comes to life in silence - powered by full electricity, completely functional, and prepared for its duties.

news.headline: Events.com has acquired Temecula Valley Balloon & Wine Festival. Camping reservations now open, with performer lineup and event schedule to follow. Acquisition strengthens Events.com's presence in Southern California.
news.summary: Individual festival tickets are now available for purchase as camping reservations open up. The performer lineup and event schedule will be announced shortly. This strategic investment has broadened Events.com's live experiences portfolio and boosted its presence in Southern California. The acquisition highlights their dedication to expanding their offerings in the region.

news.headline: TRC Companies, Inc. receives A- grade for climate disclosure from CDP for second consecutive year.
news.summary: In Windsor, Connecticut on March 13, 2025, TRC Companies, Inc. achieved an impressive A- rating from CDP, formerly known as...TRC is a leading global professional services firm that offers integrated strategy, consulting, engineering, and applied technologies to support the energy transition. The high score further solidifies TRC's position as a key player in the industry.

news.headline: Boulder Scientific Company invests in facilities to support polyolefins, electronics, aerospace & defense sectors.
news.summary: Boulder Scientific Company (BSC) located in Boulder, Colorado, revealed on March 13, 2025, the finalization of a series of investments in its manufacturing facilities in Mead and Longmont, Colorado. These investments aim to bolster support for clients in the polyolefins, electronics, aerospace, and defense industries. The advancements in technology and infrastructure will enhance the company's ability to meet the growing demands of its customers across sectors.

news.headline: Intel's stock rose with new CEO Lip-Bu Tan but challenges loom; Wall Street reacts positively.
news.summary: Investors on Wall Street reacted favorably to the announcement of Lip-Bu Tan as the new CEO of Intel. The stock saw a rise in response to this news. However, despite this initial positive reaction, Intel's stock is expected to encounter challenges in the future.

news.headline: Vallourec is a French company with a share capital of €4,761,692.46 and is registered in Meudon, France.
news.summary: VALLOUREC is a French limited liability company, operating as a société anonyme, with a Board of Directors and a share capital totaling €4,761,692.46. The company is headquartered at 12, rue de la Verrerie in Meudon, France, and is registered on the Nanterre Trade and Companies Register under number 552 142 200.

news.headline: Inventor from Texas creates THE MANDO CHEST BOOSTER cooler stand for easier access to food & beverages.
news.summary: In Pittsburgh on March 13, 2025, an inventor from Corpus Christi, Texas, shared plans for a unique cooler stand. The inventor explained that they created THE MANDO CHEST BOOSTER to facilitate easier access to food and drinks within a cooler. This innovative design elevates the cooler...

news.headline: Dow Jones fell 3.5%, but Nvidia and Boeing surged amidst the decline; Boeing stock predicted to rise 50% by analysts.
news.summary: This week saw a 3.5% decline in the Dow Jones Industrial Average, with Nvidia and Boeing being notable exceptions as they saw gains. Analysts are optimistic about Boeing, predicting a 50% rise in its stock. The overall market trend was negative, but these two companies stood out with positive performances.

news.headline: Upcoming Tesla 'affordable' EV to be stripped-down Model Y per China media. Stock fell.
news.summary: According to reports from Chinese media, the next Tesla electric vehicle marketed as "affordable" will actually be a more budget-friendly version of the existing Model Y, rather than a completely new vehicle design. As a result of this news, Tesla's stock experienced a decline.

Chicken Salad Chick opens 37th Texas location in Pflugerville on March 25, offering free chicken salad for a year.
news.summary: A popular fast casual chicken salad restaurant chain is set to mark the inauguration of its 37th location in Texas on March 25. This special event will feature a giveaway of free chicken salad for an entire year. The restaurant, known as Chicken Salad Chick, stands out as the sole fast casual establishment in the United States dedicated solely to chicken salad.

news.headline: LINGO introduces space-themed STEM kits, inspiring 10,000+ users. Founder preps for historic all-female Blue Origin flight.
news.summary: A company based in Arlington, Virginia called LINGO has created STEM lesson kits aimed at motivating future professionals in the fields of Science, Technology, Engineering, and Mathematics. These kits offer users the opportunity to experience a simulated rocket launch countdown and also develop prototypes for an earth sensing satellite. Since its inception, LINGO has successfully inspired over 10,000 individuals through these innovative kits.
